lea:title: The Pitch Science Fiction 2Q2025
lea:author: Eduard Pech
lea:description: The Pitch Science Fiction is a quarterly publication of science fiction stories by various authors, covering diverse themes. Included in this issue: Table Of Contents Plain
lea:rights: All texts and illustrations not explicitly declared as being in the public domain are copyright 2025 by Eduard Pech or by their respective authors. The complete edition is copyright 2025 by Logophilia Essentials. Logophilia Essentials is an imprint of Logophilia OÜ.
lea:text: A Martian Odyssey by Stanley G. Weinbaum.xhtml
The Time Machine by H. G. Wells.xhtml
Despoilers of the Golden Empire by Randall Garrett.xhtml
ARMAGEDDON 2419 AD by Philip Francis Nowlan.xhtml
Mr. Spaceship by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
This Crowded Earth by Robert Bloch.xhtml
Pillar of Fire by Ray Bradbury.xhtml
